members.label: floor pattern
members.description: transition from carpeted living area to hardwood/tile kitchen floor
members.long_form_open_description: The foreground living area is covered in light beige carpet which transitions to a darker wood or tile floor in the kitchen area around the island. Transition strip visible near the threshold between rooms.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Carpet under couch and rug; transition occurs at the start of the kitchen island
